ALERT_ALREADY_RUNNING_WARNING: Player is already running. Stop emulation first before opening another SWF!
DESCRIPTION_SETTINGS_LETTERBOX: Letterbox the content if the window size doesn't match the SWF's
DESCRIPTION_SETTINGS_OPEN_URL: Opens a new browser tab when a URL is clicked
DESCRIPTION_SETTINGS_ENABLE_QUICKSTART: Shows the quickstart guide on app startup
DESCRIPTION_CLOSE_WINDOW: Please close this window and try again.
DESCRIPTION_NO_INTERNET: You must be connected to the Internet to use the latest version of Ruffle. You can disable this in the Settings if this was set by mistake.
DESCRIPTION_QUICKSTART: Play Shockwave Flash files, powered by
DISCLAIMER_APP_LICENSE: Disclaimer: This app's license appears in its original language
DISCLAIMER_3RD_PARTY_LICENSES: Disclaimer: All licenses appear in their original languages
LIST_HOW_TO_1: Download some .swf files and put them in a folder
LIST_HOW_TO_2: Click "open" and select the folder with the .swf files
LIST_HOW_TO_3: Click a row then press "Play" to launch the file
LIST_HOW_TO_4: Click "Refresh" to refresh the list if you added/removed files
LIST_HOW_TO_5: Right click a row to bring up file options
PROMPT_DESCRIPTION_REVERT_BACK: Settings will be reverted back to factory settings and saved.
PROMPT_DESCRIPTION_UNSAVED_CHANGES_LOST: Any unsaved changes will be lost.
TITLE_BUTTON_SCAN_DIRECTORY: Select a directory that contains your Flash files (.swf)
TITLE_BUTTON_REFRESH: Rescan your collection and update the SWF list below
